data.name: A Night With: Neighbor
data.detailed_description:
A Night With: Neighbor is a one-evening adult visual novel where a single voyeuristic discovery turns a lifelong friendship into a night of filthy, consensual exploration. Play as the guy next door who accidentally catches May—all grown-up, all worked-up—moaning your name in the dark. What follows is a slow-burn scramble of teasing hangouts, daring dares, and raw bedroom confessions that either ignite secret love… or crash in awkward silence.

Key Features

  • Tight, choice-driven narrative – Experience an entire night that branches through playful card games, pizza-fueled flirting, late-night walks, and spicy truth-or-dare rounds;

  • Dual heat & consent system – Every line you choose tweaks Love and Lust meters, unlocking three distinct endings: Secret Lovers, Boring Neighbor, or Cold Shower;

  • Unapologetically explicit – Fully illustrated CGs and voiced moans cover everything from accidental thigh-grazes to full-on bedroom positions;

  • Brat-turned-exhibitionist heroine – May starts shy, turns bold, and fires off dirty talk that bounces between self-teasing jabs and shameless commands;

All characters are 18 +, and every explicit scene is fully consensual.

data.short_description: A one-night, choice-driven adult visual novel where catching your lifelong neighbor pleasuring herself to your photo spirals into teasing hangouts, stat-gated dares, and explicit bedroom payoffs.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS 3.5 / Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended
